form.formComment: Gelding by Capitalist facing the starter for the first time. Won a Camperdown jump-out on March 16. Jumpouts have had the look of a horse who'll be ready to go on debut.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Capitalist facing the starter for the first time. Won a Camperdown jump-out on March 16. Jumpouts have had the look of a horse who'll be ready to go on debut.

form.formComment: He is resuming after a six months break. Not seen since he finished last of 13 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw October 5 over 1300m, 7 len behind Al Prancer carrying 59.5kg at $11. On debut second last of 9 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw July 13 over 1100m, in the wet; 6 len behind Delicate Lady with 59.5kg at $4.20. Three runs to date have been horrible but he's looked a horse in two recent jumpouts wins, so giving one more chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). He is resuming after a six months break. Not seen since he finished last of 13 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw October 5 over 1300m, 7 len behind Al Prancer carrying 59.5kg at $11. On debut second last of 9 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw July 13 over 1100m, in the wet; 6 len behind Delicate Lady with 59.5kg at $4.20. Three runs to date have been horrible but he's looked a horse in two recent jumpouts wins, so giving one more chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early stages. Laid in under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 2nd of 8 at Warrnambool Mdn-Sw on March 9 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Crickwood carrying 56.5kg at $5.50. Second run from a spell did the work up front then tired 5th of 11 at Echuca Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 1209m, 3 len behind Western Lane with 59.5kg at $3.70. Expected to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Third-up today. Resuming 2nd of 8 at Warrnambool Mdn-Sw on March 9 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Crickwood carrying 56.5kg at $5.50. Second run from a spell did the work up front then tired 5th of 11 at Echuca Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 1209m, 3 len behind Western Lane with 59.5kg at $3.70. Expected to be in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running from the 400m until approaching the 200m.

form.formComment: Back from a long spell. Only had one start last campaign raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 7 at Moonee Valley 3yo C&G Mdn-Sw on October 3 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind St Edward carrying 58kg at $1.85. First up last campaign 3rd of 8 at Canterbury 2yo C&G Mdn-Sw on June 9 over 1250m, slow going 2 len behind Autumn Boy with 56kg at $3.30. Was runner-up in a jump-out at Cranbourne on March 30. Far from disgraced at two runs to date, trials since being gelded have been impressive and Ma

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered on jumping by Perfect Apple.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding (Hellbent - Calle Flora). Tom Dabernig has him ready for this with eight recent trials leading in today's debut. Finished fourth in an Avoca jump-out on March 31. Drawn not ideal, but jumpouts have been adequate, so watch market.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Three-year-old gelding (Hellbent - Calle Flora). Tom Dabernig has him ready for this with eight recent trials leading in today's debut. Finished fourth in an Avoca jump-out on March 31. Drawn not ideal, but jumpouts have been adequate, so watch market.

form.formComment: At debut, sat behind the speed prior to fading 10th of 12 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 5 over 1400m, 13 len behind Labelmaker with 55kg at $10. Jumpout since the plain debut was OK, so might be worth another chance with blinkers added.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). At debut, sat behind the speed prior to fading 10th of 12 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 5 over 1400m, 13 len behind Labelmaker with 55kg at $10. Jumpout since the plain debut was OK, so might be worth another chance with blinkers added.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 12 at Pakenham 3yo F Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1000m, slow going 0.9 len behind Invincible Lover carrying 57kg at $8. Previously second-up 4th of 7 at Moonee Valley 3yo F Mdn-Sw on October 3 over 1200m, 5 len behind Shocap carrying 57kg at $4.40. First up run good enough for this and better suited with the slight rise in trip.

formComments.title: TAB

Previously second-up 4th of 7 at Moonee Valley 3yo F Mdn-Sw on October 3 over 1200m, 5 len behind Shocap carrying 57kg at $4.40. First up run good enough for this and better suited with the slight rise in trip.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly getting its head up.
Raced keenly in the early and middle stages.
